questions.question: What high-tech tag did California's Santa Clara Valley acquire in the 1970s?
Who, while filming Superman, asked, "What's my motivation—how do we know that Jor-El doesn't look like a green bagel"?
What U.S. agency was dubbed "The Brotherhood"?
What were all U.S. auto exhaust systems fitted with, starting in 1975?
What sport used the term "home run" long before baseball?
What Baywatch babe noted that if David Hasselhoff has real breasts, "they're probably the only ones on the show"?
